description: Reader at revision depth 1 catches up to a seed at depth 3 in a single HEADS/WANT pass, verifying that only the delta is fetched

documents.notes: Document used to verify depth-N incremental catchup behavior

notes: seed_extra_revisions: 2 means the seed holds genesis + 2 follow-up revisions (depth 3 total).
reader_start_extra_revisions: 1 means the reader is pre-seeded with genesis + 1 follow-up revision (depth 2).
A single HEADS/WANT pass should deliver only the one missing delta revision to the reader.
